angle: Hububb Main - Post 3, phone variant: the Hububb ecosystem. Three products, Host, Stay, and Work, are one connected platform. A cinematic cover, one slide per product, a real phone showing Host answering a guest, and a moving montage of real places to close.
brief: Post 3 of the @wearehububb main series, the phone/polish variant of the ecosystem explainer. pillar: thesis, the ecosystem for flexible stays, everything around the stay. funnel: reach, hook-first, works cold. angle: three-forms, the invisible layer resolves into three connected products. This variant lifts the visual quality: the cover goes cinematic over a warm dusk home instead of a flat field with its lead line landing then dimming as the tail lights, Host earns a real in-app proof slide (everything a host needs, all in one app, a single iPhone whose screen cross-dissolves through the app, unified inbox, AI messaging, cleaning, reports, and the guest portal, each tagged with a feature label and a progress row), and the close resolves on the newer moving montage of real places rather than the static three-card diagram. One idea per slide, the seven Host capabilities are shown on the phone and named in the caption. Light and dark alternate for rhythm, wordmark top-left throughout, slow zoom on every slide.

social.firstLine: Three products, one ecosystem built around the stay.
social.caption:
Three products, one ecosystem built around the stay.

Hububb Host automates the whole of hosting. Guest messaging, cleaner booking, maintenance, pricing, reports, one inbox, one calendar, all handled while you stay in control.

Hububb Stay opens the door to managed, longer stays. Monthly homes for the people who need more room to move, where everything is taken care of and you just live.

Hububb Work is the app for the people who keep it running. The cleaners, the handymen, the trades, finding real, recurring work on real properties.

Host, Stay, and Work are not three apps that happen to share a name. They are one moving system, built for the host, the guest, and the worker at once. We started in London, with real people on real properties, because the layer beneath the stay has to be built, not declared.

Host. Stay. Work. Built by Hububb.
